t.t: Accounting Software UAE — VAT, Corporate Tax & E-invoicing 2026 Ready

Accounting software in UAE built on Odoo — VAT filing, Corporate Tax, E-invoicing UAE 2026, multi-currency, bank reconciliation, and audit-ready reporting for SMEs and growing companies in Abu Dhabi and Dubai.

accounting software uae, odoo accounting uae, vat accounting software dubai, corporate tax software uae, e-invoicing uae 2026, accounting software abu dhabi, sme accounting software uae, online accounting software uae

div.h1: Accounting Software UAE — VAT & E-invoicing 2026 Ready
div.p: Stop juggling Excel sheets, tax deadlines, and missing invoices. Odoo Accounting deployed by Techrise — your books closed in days, not weeks.

div.div: Generates FTA VAT & Corporate Tax returns from real entries
One-click bank reconciliation across UAE banks
E-invoicing UAE 2026 mandate compliant out of the box

img.alt: Odoo Accounting dashboard — VAT, cash flow, and invoices

div.h2: Why finance teams in the UAE switch to Odoo Accounting

div.p: VAT return, Corporate Tax, and E-invoicing UAE 2026 generated from real invoices — not handwritten templates.

div.h4: Close the books in days, not weeks
div.p: Automated bank reconciliation, recurring entries, and audit trail mean your monthly close stops being a fire drill.

div.h4: One source of truth, every channel
div.p: Sales, purchases, payroll, and inventory all post to the same ledger — no more "which Excel is correct?"

div.h4: Dashboards your CFO will actually use
div.p: Cash flow, P&L, AR aging, and KPIs in real time — in English and Arabic, on desktop and mobile.
30-minute walkthrough on your numbers — no slideware.

form.p: Your details stay private. Used only to contact you about your demo.

div.h2: From spreadsheet chaos to a clean monthly close

ul.li: Last-minute panic before every FTA deadline
Multiple "final_v3.xlsx" floating around
Bank reconciliation by hand, every month
No idea who owes you what, until aging report
Auditors ask for files you can't find
VAT return generated automatically — review & submit
Single source of truth, audit trail on every entry
Auto-import bank statements, one-click matching
Real-time AR aging, dunning emails go out for you
Auditor portal — export any report by period

div.h2: Everything your finance team needs
div.p: One platform. No add-ons. No surprises.
Sales invoices, recurring billing, customer statements, and automated reminders that get you paid faster.
Vendor bills, payment runs, three-way matching, and supplier aging — fully integrated with procurement.
Auto-import statements, smart matching, and one-click reconciliation across multiple UAE bank accounts.
UAE VAT return, Corporate Tax computations, and audit files generated from posted entries — not retyped.
Structured e-invoices, QR codes, and Peppol-style transmission ready for the UAE 2026 mandate.
P&L, balance sheet, cash flow, AR/AP aging, budget vs. actual — drillable by period, branch, or project.

div.h2: Common questions

details.summary: How long does implementation take?
details.p: For most SMEs: 2–6 weeks end-to-end. Faster if you're migrating from QuickBooks or Zoho. A scoping call up front pins down the exact timeline.

details.summary: How much does it cost?
details.p: Pricing depends on the number of users and modules. We give you a fixed quote after the free discovery call — no surprise charges, and the first call is always free.

details.summary: Can you migrate our existing data from QuickBooks / Zoho / Tally / Excel?
details.p: Yes. Migration of customers, vendors, chart of accounts, opening balances, and historical transactions is a standard part of every project.

details.summary: Is it ready for E-invoicing UAE 2026?
details.p: Yes. The platform is configured with the structured e-invoice format, QR codes, and Peppol-style transmission expected by the UAE 2026 mandate.

details.summary: Do you train our finance team?
details.p: Every project includes hands-on training in Arabic and English, plus documentation, plus a support window after go-live.

details.summary: Do I still need an accountant?
details.p: The software handles posting, calculations, and reporting — your accountant still owns judgment calls, year-end, and audit liaison. Most teams free up 40–60% of their bookkeeping time.

details.summary: Is the interface in Arabic?
details.p: Yes — full Arabic UI, Arabic invoices and reports, and bilingual support team. RTL layouts everywhere.

div.h2: Ready to close your next month in days?
div.p: Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll show Odoo Accounting on your numbers and your VAT period.

t.t: HR & Payroll Software UAE — WPS, Attendance, Leaves & End-of-Service
HR & payroll software in UAE on Odoo — WPS-compliant payroll, attendance, leaves, end-of-service, employee self-service, and UAE labor law ready for SMEs and growing companies.
hr software uae, payroll software uae, hrms uae, wps payroll software dubai, attendance system uae, hr management abu dhabi, end of service uae, employee self service uae

div.h1: HR & Payroll Software UAE — WPS & Labor Law Compliant
div.p: Stop running HR on Excel sheets. Attendance, leaves, payroll, and end-of-service — all in one Arabic + English platform, ready for UAE's WPS the day you go live.

div.div: WPS-compliant payroll, ready for your MOHRE submission
Attendance, leaves, and approvals on employee self-service

img.alt: HR & Payroll dashboard — employees, attendance, payroll

div.h2: Why HR teams in the UAE choose Techrise

div.p: Salaries, allowances, overtime, deductions, and the WPS SIF file generated in one click — accurate to the fil.
UAE Labor Law gratuity formulas applied automatically — limited vs unlimited contracts, partial years, resignations, terminations.
Leave requests, payslips, expense claims, document uploads — all on mobile. HR stops being a help desk.
Every contract, document, salary change, and approval logged with a full audit trail. MOHRE inspections become a non-event.
30-minute walkthrough on your team size — no slideware.

form.p: Your details stay private. Used only to contact you about your demo.

div.h2: From spreadsheet HR to a real HRMS

ul.li: Attendance from a paper register or biometric exports
Leave requests lost in WhatsApp chats
Payroll recalculated three times every month
End-of-service estimated, hoped to be right
No idea who's on leave next week
Biometric / mobile check-in feeds attendance live
Approval workflow with audit trail and notifications
One-click payroll + WPS SIF export
End-of-service calculated to UAE Labor Law, every time
Live calendar — who's in, who's off, who's hired next

div.h2: Everything HR runs on
div.p: One platform from hire to gratuity.
Contracts, documents, visa expiry alerts, dependents, and emergency contacts in one secure profile.
Biometric, web, or mobile check-in. Shift planning, overtime, and late tracking.
Annual, sick, unpaid — full leave policy engine with multi-level approvals.
Salary, allowances, deductions, gratuity, and one-click WPS SIF export for your bank.
UAE Labor Law gratuity calculated automatically, with full breakdown for the employee and the auditor.
Headcount, attrition, cost per hire, leave usage — dashboards for the CHRO and the CFO.

div.h2: Common questions

details.summary: Does it generate WPS SIF files?
details.p: Yes. After every payroll run, you can export the SIF file in the format required by your bank for MOHRE submission. No manual reformatting.

details.summary: How does end-of-service calculation work?
details.p: The system applies the UAE Labor Law formulas automatically based on contract type (limited / unlimited), basic salary, years of service, and reason for leaving. Each calculation is fully auditable.

details.summary: Can employees use it on their phone?
details.p: Yes — check-in, leave requests, payslip download, expense claims, and document uploads all work on mobile. Reduces HR's daily inbox by 70%+.

details.summary: Can you migrate from our current HRMS / Excel?
details.p: Yes. Employees, contracts, leave balances, and historical payslips are all standard migration items.

details.summary: Is it ready for multiple branches / multi-company?
details.p: Yes — multi-company, multi-branch, and multi-currency are native. Useful for groups with operations across the UAE and GCC.

div.h2: Ready to run HR like a real business?
div.p: Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll show Odoo HR on a team your size.

t.t: Call Center Software UAE — VoIP, IVR, Recording & CRM Integration
Call center software in UAE on Odoo — inbound and outbound queues, IVR, call recording, agent KPIs, and CRM-linked calls for sales and support teams in Abu Dhabi and Dubai.
call center software uae, voip call center dubai, ivr software uae, contact center abu dhabi, call recording software uae, predictive dialer uae, odoo voip uae

div.h1: Call Center Software UAE — CRM-Linked Calls, IVR & QA
div.p: Stop running sales and support on agents' personal phones. Inbound and outbound queues, IVR routing, call recording, and live KPIs — wired to your CRM from day one.

div.div: Inbound + outbound queues with IVR & skill-based routing
Every call linked to the CRM contact, with recording & notes
Live wallboard for the floor, KPIs for the team lead

img.alt: Call center dashboard — live queue, agents, KPIs

div.h2: Why sales & support teams switch

div.h4: Every call counts toward a CRM record
div.p: Inbound calls auto-match the caller against your CRM contacts. Outbound clicks dial from the lead screen.
100% of calls recorded, searchable by agent, customer, or campaign. Scorecards built right into the recording.

div.h4: Right call to the right agent
div.p: IVR menus, skill-based routing, language detection, and overflow rules — built in, no add-ons.

div.h4: Wallboard the floor will actually look at
div.p: Calls in queue, longest wait, agent status, SLA breaches — on a TV in the call room, live.

div.h3: Get a Free Call Center Demo
div.p: 30-minute walkthrough on your call flow — no slideware.

form.p: Your details stay private. Used only to contact you about your demo.

div.h2: From personal phones to a real call center

ul.li: No idea who called, when, or what was said
Call quality complaints — no recording to check
KPIs in a manager's notebook
Customers shuffled through 4 agents to find help
Agent leaves with the customer's number on their phone
Every call logged, transcribed-ready, tied to a contact
Searchable recording archive with QA scorecards
Live KPIs and historical reports out of the box
IVR + skill routing gets calls to the right person first
All customer data stays in your CRM, not on devices

div.h2: What's inside
div.p: Full contact center stack. No third-party assemblies.
Inbound, outbound, blended; skill-based, time-based, language-based.
Visual menu builder, multi-language, with conditional logic and direct-to-agent overrides.
Every call recorded, indexed, and pinned to the CRM record. Retention policies built in.
Calls in queue, longest wait, agents online, SLA breaches — on a screen on the floor.
Click-to-call from any lead. Inbound auto-pop with full customer history.
Score calls against your script. Coaching notes, agent self-review, supervisor sign-off.

div.h2: Common questions

details.summary: Do we need to buy a PBX or special hardware?
details.p: No. The system runs on cloud VoIP via SIP trunking. Agents need a USB headset and a browser, nothing else.

details.summary: Can you provision UAE numbers?
details.p: Yes — we work with licensed UAE telecom providers to provision local DIDs and toll-free numbers for inbound, plus outbound caller-ID routing.

details.summary: How many agents does it scale to?
details.p: From 3 to 300+ agents on the same platform. Most deployments grow over time without re-platforming.

details.summary: Can it integrate with our existing CRM?
details.p: Yes — native with Odoo CRM, REST API for other CRMs. We deliver the integration as part of the project.

details.summary: Are call recordings compliant with UAE regulations?
details.p: Yes — recordings stored encrypted, with retention policies, customer-disclosure prompts, and role-based access for QA staff.

div.h2: Ready to run a real call center?
div.p: Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll demo on your queue setup.

t.t: Inventory & Procurement Software UAE — Multi-Warehouse, Vendor Portal, Barcode
Inventory and procurement software in UAE on Odoo — multi-warehouse stock, vendor portal, purchase approvals, barcode scanning, reorder rules, and live inventory dashboards.
inventory software uae, procurement software uae, warehouse management uae, vendor portal uae, purchase order software dubai, barcode inventory uae, stock management abu dhabi

div.p: Stop discovering stock-outs at the customer counter. Multi-warehouse stock, reorder rules, vendor portals, and barcode scanning — wired to accounting so every movement is costed.

div.div: Real-time stock across warehouses, branches, and trucks
Automatic reorder rules and supplier lead-time tracking

img.alt: Inventory & Procurement dashboard — multi-warehouse, POs, low stock

div.h2: Why ops & procurement teams choose Techrise

div.p: Live inventory across all warehouses, branches, and in-transit. Sold from anywhere; reserved instantly.
Min/max rules, lead times, and seasonality drive purchase requests automatically — no Excel reorder lists.
Vendor portal for RFQ responses, PO acceptance, ASN, and invoice upload — your AP team stops chasing emails.
PO + receipt + invoice matched by the system. Bills only post when everything ties out.
30-minute walkthrough on your warehouse setup — no slideware.

form.p: Your details stay private. Used only to contact you about your demo.

div.h2: From stock-out surprises to a real warehouse system

ul.li: Stock-outs discovered at the counter
Dead stock nobody noticed for months
Purchases approved by WhatsApp screenshot
Vendor invoices arriving without a matching PO
Stocktake means closing the warehouse
Live stock, alerts before you run out
Slow-moving reports surface dead stock weekly
Multi-level digital approvals with audit trail
Three-way matching blocks orphan invoices
Cycle counting with barcode — no shutdown needed

div.h2: What's covered
div.p: Stock, purchase, and supply chain on one platform.
Locations, sublocations, internal transfers, batches, and serial numbers across the UAE.
Min/max, lead time, seasonality — auto-generate purchase requests.
Suppliers respond to RFQs, accept POs, upload invoices — outside your firewall.
Multi-level approvals by amount, department, or vendor — audit trail on every step.
Receiving, picking, packing, transfers — all by barcode. Works with USB, Bluetooth, and ring scanners.
Stock value, turnover, dead stock, vendor performance — drillable dashboards.

div.h2: Common questions

details.summary: Does it support multiple warehouses?
details.p: Yes — unlimited warehouses, with internal transfers, replenishment, and consolidated reports across all locations.

details.summary: What barcode hardware do we need?
details.p: Most USB and Bluetooth scanners work out of the box. We help you pick the right hardware for your warehouse layout if needed.

details.summary: How does it integrate with accounting?
details.p: Tightly. Every stock movement posts to the correct GL account in real time — no end-of-month reconciliation needed.

details.summary: Can we do cycle counting without shutting down?
details.p: Yes — barcode-driven cycle counts run section by section, with variance reports and approval workflow.

details.summary: Is there a mobile app for warehouse staff?
details.p: Yes — Odoo's inventory mobile app handles picking, packing, transfers, and receipts on Android and iOS.

div.h2: Ready to know your real stock, in real time?
div.p: Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll demo on a warehouse like yours.

t.t: Full ERP Suite UAE — Odoo for Sales, Accounting, HR, Inventory & More
Complete ERP suite in UAE on Odoo — sales, accounting, HR, inventory, manufacturing, project, and marketing on one platform. Implementation, customization, and support by Techrise.
erp software uae, odoo erp uae, full erp suite uae, all in one erp dubai, integrated erp abu dhabi, odoo implementation uae, cloud erp uae

div.h1: Full ERP Suite UAE — One Platform, Every Department
div.p: Stop stitching together accounting, HR, inventory, and CRM tools. One Odoo platform that scales from 10 to 1,000 users — implemented by an Official Odoo Partner in Abu Dhabi.

div.div: Sales, Accounting, HR, Inventory, Manufacturing, Project — together
Single source of truth — one customer, one ledger, one report
Modular: start with what you need, add modules as you grow

img.alt: Odoo ERP suite — modules connected to one platform

div.h2: Why growing UAE companies pick a full ERP

div.p: Replace accounting + CRM + HR + inventory + project tools with one platform — no integration hell, no double entry.
Cross-module dashboards: sales pipeline, cash flow, headcount, stock turn, project margin — all on one screen.
Begin with the 2-3 modules you need most. Add the rest when the team's ready. No big-bang rewrites.

div.h4: UAE 2026 compliant out of the box
div.p: VAT, Corporate Tax, E-invoicing UAE 2026, WPS payroll — pre-configured for the UAE regulatory landscape.
30-minute walkthrough on your business — no slideware.

textarea.name: body
textarea.placeholder: e.g. Construction company, 40 staff, 5 active projects

form.p: Your details stay private. Used only to contact you about your demo.

div.h2: From seven tools to one platform

ul.li: Customer data in CRM, accounting, and inventory — all different
Monthly close means 4 systems and 3 days of reconciliation
Each tool is a separate subscription, separate vendor, separate login
Reports cobbled together in Excel from CSV exports
Every new system means a new integration to maintain
One customer record, used by sales, accounting, and support
Real-time consolidated P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow
One subscription, one vendor, one login per user
Native reporting + Studio for custom dashboards
New module = a checkbox, not a project

div.h2: Modules included
div.p: Pick what you need today. The rest activate when you're ready.
Pipeline, quotations, orders, contracts, and customer portal.
VAT, Corporate Tax, E-invoicing UAE 2026, multi-currency, audit-ready.
Employees, attendance, leaves, UAE payroll, WPS, and end-of-service.
Multi-warehouse stock, barcode, reorder rules, and supplier portal.
BOMs, MRP, work centers, quality, and shop-floor terminals.
Timesheets, project costing, milestones, and profitability dashboards.

div.h2: Common questions

details.summary: How long does a full ERP rollout take?
details.p: Phased rollouts: 4-8 weeks for the first 2 modules, then incremental modules over 3-6 months. Big-bang rollouts only for special cases.

details.summary: Cloud-hosted or on-premise?
details.p: Both supported. Most clients pick our managed cloud hosting on UAE-region servers. We also deploy on your own infrastructure if required.

details.summary: Can it handle multi-company / multi-currency?
details.p: Yes — multi-company, multi-currency, multi-branch, multi-warehouse, multi-language are all native.

details.summary: What about customization for our industry?
details.p: Odoo is highly customizable. Our team builds custom modules, workflows, and reports on top of the standard suite when needed.

details.summary: How is pricing structured?
details.p: Annual subscription per user + a one-time implementation fee. We give a fixed quote after the discovery call — no surprise charges.

details.summary: Do you train our team?
details.p: Yes — role-based training in Arabic and English, documentation, plus a post-go-live support window.

div.h2: Ready to run everything on one platform?
div.p: Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll show Odoo on a business shaped like yours.

t.t: Custom Software Development UAE — Odoo, Web, Mobile & API Integration
Custom software development in UAE — Odoo customizations, web apps, iOS & Android mobile apps, REST API integrations, and system integrations built by Techrise in Abu Dhabi.
custom software development uae, software development company abu dhabi, odoo customization uae, mobile app development uae, web development dubai, api integration uae, bespoke software uae

div.h1: Custom Software UAE — Built For You, Owned By You
div.p: When off-the-shelf doesn't fit. Odoo customizations, web apps, iOS / Android, and API integrations — delivered by a UAE-based team you can sit with.

div.div: Odoo customizations and full custom modules
You own the source code, the data, and the hosting

img.alt: Custom software development — code editor with tech stack

div.h2: Why teams pick Techrise for custom software

div.p: We model your actual process — not a generic SaaS — so the system fits the team, not the other way around.
Every 2 weeks you see real software, give feedback, and adjust direction. No 6-month silent builds.
Source code, database, infrastructure, hosting — all yours. We can stay as your partner or you can run it solo.

div.h4: A team you can sit with
div.p: Based in Abu Dhabi. Workshops face-to-face, post-launch in your office. Time-zone-aligned, culture-aligned.
We'll get back within one business day with next steps.

div.label: What are you trying to build? *

textarea.name: body
textarea.placeholder: e.g. A mobile app for our field technicians, integrated with our Odoo backend.

form.p: Your details stay private. NDAs available on request.

div.h2: What we build
div.p: Bespoke software across the stack.
Custom modules, workflows, fields, automations, and Studio dashboards on top of Odoo.
Customer portals, admin dashboards, marketplaces, internal tools — React + Python backends.
iOS and Android apps — field service, sales rep, delivery driver, customer-facing apps.
Connect Odoo (or anything) to banks, payment gateways, government portals, logistics, CRMs.
From legacy systems, Excel, QuickBooks, Zoho — clean migration with audit trail.
Managed cloud hosting in UAE-region data centers — backups, monitoring, scaling, security.

div.h2: Common questions

details.summary: What technologies do you use?
details.p: Backend: Python (Odoo, FastAPI, Django). Frontend: React, OWL. Mobile: Flutter and native. Database: PostgreSQL. Infrastructure: Docker, Linux, UAE-region cloud.

details.summary: How does pricing work?
details.p: Fixed-price for well-scoped projects, monthly retainer for ongoing development. We always start with a free scoping session and a written proposal — no surprises.

details.summary: Do we own the source code?
details.p: Yes — fully. The IP transfers to you on delivery. You can hire other developers, switch hosts, or fork the codebase at any time.

details.summary: What about maintenance and support?
details.p: We offer SLA-backed support plans. Or we hand over to your team with full documentation. Your call.

details.summary: How long do projects typically take?
details.p: Small features: 2-4 weeks. Mid-sized apps: 2-4 months. Large platforms: 6+ months, delivered in phases with working software every sprint.

div.h2: Have a project in mind?
div.p: Tell us what you're trying to build. We'll come back with a scoped plan, fast.
